Title.text: Tasks Completed and Avg Cycle Time

viz:VizFrame.vizProperties: { plotArea:{ dataLabel:{ visible:true, type:'value', hideWhenOverlap:true }, colorPalette:['#5899DA','#E8743B','#19A979','#ED4A7B','#945ECF','#13A4B4','#525DF4','#BF399E','#6C8893','#EE6868','#2F6497'], isScrollable:true }, interaction:{ zoom:{enablement:'enabled'}, selectability:{mode:'multiple'} }, legend:{ visible:true, position:'bottom' }, title:{ visible:false } }

viz.data:FlattenedDataset.data: { path: 'performanceAnalytics>/ZC_GSP26SAP02_WF_PERF', parameters: { $select: 'CreationDate,IsCompletedCount,CycleTimeDays', $filter: 'StatusCategory eq \'Completed\'' }, sorter: { path: 'CreationDate', descending: false } }

Title.text: Task Cycle Time by Business Object
